speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Eating out
questions: Do you have any favourite restaurants?
Is there any food you don't like?
What do you usually order to drink?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Yes, I have some favourite restaurants near my home. I don't like any seafood. I usually order some juice or tea.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Describe a shopping trip

cueCard.topic: Describe a recent shopping trip for food.
bullets: and explain whether the prices were cheap or expensive

speaking.sampleAnswer: I would like to talk about a trip to the market. I bought a lot of vegetables and a few onions. There was a discount on organic food, so it wasn't too expensive.
